auditRequirement: Verify that the Data Controller notifies the Commissioner of any personal data breach 'as soon as practicable' (operationalized as 72 hours per JPDP Guidelines) upon becoming aware.
testingProcedure: Examine the Incident Response Plan for specific notification timelines to JPDP.
Sample 3 recent security incidents and verify the timestamp of 'Discovery' vs 'JPDP Notification'.
Check if the notification includes mandatory fields prescribed by JPDP.

evidenceArtifacts.name: JPDP Notification Submission Proof
evidenceArtifacts.description: Email confirmation or portal submission receipt from MyPDPA.

auditRequirement: Verify the appointment of at least one Data Protection Officer (DPO) and their subsequent registration with the JPDP Commissioner.
testingProcedure: Examine the DPO Letter of Appointment and Job Description for independence and authority.
Verify the JPDP DPO Registration confirmation.
Review the DPO Annual Compliance Report to Management/Board.

evidenceArtifacts.name: DPO Letter of Appointment
evidenceArtifacts.description: Formally signed appointment letter specifying roles and responsibilities.

evidenceArtifacts.name: JPDP DPO Registration Receipt
evidenceArtifacts.description: Proof of notification to the Commissioner under Section 12A(3).

evidenceArtifacts.name: DPO Annual Compliance Report
evidenceArtifacts.description: Evidence of monitoring activities performed by the DPO.
